feat.name: Burrowing Shot
feat.text: You tune your light mortar to maximize penetration into hard surfaces. You Launch your light mortar, dealing half the normal amount of damage to creatures in the area of the blast but double damage to objects and structures.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
